payload.text:

https://image2url.com/r2/default/images/1770803825046-22c8eac0-7710-4020-82c4-63b0f7f85023.png

On the "JORNAL"  "STORIES & SOUNDS" page please display this picture on the "MIDNIGHT IN TOKYO" card:
https://image2url.com/r2/default/images/1770803825046-22c8eac0-7710-4020-82c4-63b0f7f85023.png

**Updating Image Source**

Okay, I'm focusing on the image source update for the "MIDNIGHT IN TOKYO" card within `Journal.tsx`. The current image is loaded, and I'm ready to integrate the replacement, and testing it.

entries.description: Update the image for the "MIDNIGHT IN TOKYO" journal article to the requested premium asset.
